index.js

const express= require('express');
const mysql=require('mysql2/promise');
const cors= require('cors');
const crypto = require('crypto');
const app=express();
const PORT=5000;
app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());
const db=mysql.createPool({
    host: 'localhost',
    user: 'root',
    password: '2004',
    waitForConnections: true,
    connectionLimit: 10,
    queueLimit: 0
});

function hashPassword(password, salt = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex')) {
    const hash = crypto.pbkdf2Sync(password, salt, 100000, 64, 'sha512').toString('hex');
    return `${salt}:${hash}`;
}

function isPasswordValid(password, storedPassword) {
    const [salt, originalHash] = storedPassword.split(':');
    const testHash = hashPassword(password, salt).split(':')[1];
    return crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(originalHash, 'hex'), Buffer.from(testHash, 'hex'));
}

async function authRequired(req, res, next) {
    try {
        const authHeader = req.headers.authorization || '';
        const token = authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ') ? authHeader.slice(7) : '';

        if (!token) {
            return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Login required' });
        }

        const [rows] = await db.query(
            `select u.id, u.name, u.email
             from moviedb.sessions s
             join moviedb.users u on u.id = s.user_id
             where s.token = ? and s.expires_at > now()`,
            [token]
        );

        if (!rows.length) {
            return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Session expired. Please login again.' });
        }

        req.user = rows[0];
        req.token = token;
        next();
    } catch (err) {
        res.status(500).json({ error: String(err.message || err) });
    }
}

async function createSession(userId) {
    const token = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');
    await db.query(
        'insert into moviedb.sessions (user_id, token, expires_at) values (?, ?, date_add(now(), interval 7 day))',
        [userId, token]
    );
    return token;
}

async function dbinit(){
    try{
    const connection= await db.getConnection();
    await connection.query('create database if not exists moviedb');
    await connection.query(`create table if not exists moviedb.users (
      id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
      created_at TIMESTAMP not null DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
      name VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL,
      email VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
        )`);
    await connection.query(`create table if not exists moviedb.sessions (
      id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
      user_id INT NOT NULL,
      token VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      expires_at DATETIME NOT NULL,
      created_at TIMESTAMP not null DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES moviedb.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
        )`);
    await connection.query(`create table if not exists moviedb.movie (
      id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
      created_at TIMESTAMP not null DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
      user_id INT DEFAULT NULL,
      username VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
      lastname VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
      genres VARCHAR (255) DEFAULT NULL,
      dob DATE DEFAULT NULL,
      theatres VARCHAR(400) DEFAULT NULL,
      moviename VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL
        )`);
    const [columns] = await connection.query(
        `select column_name from information_schema.columns
         where table_schema = 'moviedb' and table_name = 'movie' and column_name = 'user_id'`
    );
    if (!columns.length) {
        await connection.query('alter table moviedb.movie add column user_id INT DEFAULT NULL after created_at');
    }
    connection.release();
    console.log('db connected successfully');}
    catch(err){
        console.error('db connection failed', err);
        process.exit(1);
    }
}

app.post('/api/auth/signup', async(req, res)=>{
    try {
        const { name, email, password } = req.body;

        if (!name || !email || !password) {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Name, email, and password are required' });
        }

        if (password.length < 6) {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Password must be at least 6 characters' });
        }

        const [existing] = await db.query('select id from moviedb.users where email = ?', [email]);
        if (existing.length) {
            return res.status(409).json({ error: 'Email already registered' });
        }

        const passwordHash = hashPassword(password);
        const [result] = await db.query(
            'insert into moviedb.users (name, email, password_hash) values (?, ?, ?)',
            [name, email, passwordHash]
        );
        const token = await createSession(result.insertId);

        res.status(201).json({
            token,
            user: { id: result.insertId, name, email }
        });
    } catch (err) {
        res.status(500).json({ error: String(err.message || err) });
    }
});

app.post('/api/auth/login', async(req, res)=>{
    try {
        const { email, password } = req.body;

        if (!email || !password) {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Email and password are required' });
        }

        const [rows] = await db.query('select * from moviedb.users where email = ?', [email]);
        if (!rows.length || !isPasswordValid(password, rows[0].password_hash)) {
            return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid email or password' });
        }

        const token = await createSession(rows[0].id);

        res.json({
            token,
            user: { id: rows[0].id, name: rows[0].name, email: rows[0].email }
        });
    } catch (err) {
        res.status(500).json({ error: String(err.message || err) });
    }
});

app.get('/api/auth/me', authRequired, (req, res)=>{
    res.json({ user: req.user });
});

app.post('/api/auth/logout', authRequired, async(req, res)=>{
    try {
        await db.query('delete from moviedb.sessions where token = ?', [req.token]);
        res.json({ message: 'Logged out' });
    } catch (err) {
        res.status(500).json({ error: String(err.message || err) });
    }
});

app.get('/api/entry', authRequired, async(req, res)=>{
    try{
    const [rows]=await db.query(
        'select * from moviedb.movie where user_id = ? order by created_at desc',
        [req.user.id]
    )
    res.json(rows);}
    catch(err){res.status(500).json({error: String(err.message || err)});
}
});

app.post('/api/entry', authRequired, async(req, res)=>{
    try{
        const b=req.body;
        if (!b.username || !b.lastname){
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Username and lastname are required' });
        }

    const [result]=await db.query(`
        insert into moviedb.movie (user_id, username, lastname, genres, dob, theatres, moviename ) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
    [req.user.id,
        b.username,
        b.lastname,
        b.genres || null,
        b.dob || null,
        b.theatres || null,
        b.moviename || null

    ]);
    console.log("data inserted successfully");
    const [rows]=await db.query('select * from moviedb.movie where id = ?', [result.insertId]);
    res.json(rows[0]);
    }
    catch(err){
        res.status(500).json({error: String(err.message || err)});
    }
});

dbinit().then(()=>{
    app.listen(PORT, () => console.log('server running on port ', PORT));
});




App.jsx

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";

const API_URL = "http://localhost:5000/api";

const initialMovieForm = {
  username: "",
  lastname: "",
  genres: "",
  dob: "",
  theatres: "",
  moviename: ""
};

const initialAuthForm = {
  name: "",
  email: "",
  password: ""
};

function getSavedToken() {
  return localStorage.getItem("movie-auth-token") || "";
}

export default function App() {
  const [entry, setEntry] = useState([]);
  const [form, setForm] = useState(initialMovieForm);
  const [authForm, setAuthForm] = useState(initialAuthForm);
  const [authMode, setAuthMode] = useState("login");
  const [token, setToken] = useState(getSavedToken);
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState("");

  const canSubmitMovie = useMemo(() => {
    return form.username.trim() && form.lastname.trim();
  }, [form.username, form.lastname]);

  const canSubmitAuth = useMemo(() => {
    const hasLoginFields = authForm.email.trim() && authForm.password.trim();
    return authMode === "login" ? hasLoginFields : hasLoginFields && authForm.name.trim();
  }, [authForm, authMode]);

  function authHeaders() {
    return {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`
    };
  }

  function saveSession(nextToken, nextUser) {
    localStorage.setItem("movie-auth-token", nextToken);
    setToken(nextToken);
    setUser(nextUser);
  }

  function clearSession() {
    localStorage.removeItem("movie-auth-token");
    setToken("");
    setUser(null);
    setEntry([]);
  }

  async function loadEntry() {
    if (!token) return;

    try {
      setError("");

      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/entry`, {
        headers: authHeaders()
      });

      const data = await res.json();

      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error);
      }

      setEntry(data);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message);
      if (err.message.toLowerCase().includes("login") || err.message.toLowerCase().includes("session")) {
        clearSession();
      }
    }
  }

  async function loadCurrentUser() {
    if (!token) return;

    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/auth/me`, {
        headers: authHeaders()
      });

      const data = await res.json();

      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error);
      }

      setUser(data.user);
      loadEntry();
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message);
      clearSession();
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    loadCurrentUser();
  }, [token]);

  function handleMovieChange(e) {
    const { name, value } = e.target;

    setForm(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [name]: value
    }));
  }

  function handleAuthChange(e) {
    const { name, value } = e.target;

    setAuthForm(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [name]: value
    }));
  }

  async function onAuthSubmit(e) {
    e.preventDefault();

    if (!canSubmitAuth) {
      setError(authMode === "login" ? "Email and password required" : "Name, email, and password required");
      return;
    }

    try {
      setError("");
      const body = authMode === "login"
        ? { email: authForm.email, password: authForm.password }
        : authForm;

      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/auth/${authMode}`, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "Content-Type": "application/json"
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(body)
      });

      const data = await res.json();

      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error);
      }

      setAuthForm(initialAuthForm);
      saveSession(data.token, data.user);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message);
    }
  }

  async function onLogout() {
    if (token) {
      await fetch(`${API_URL}/auth/logout`, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: authHeaders()
      }).catch(() => {});
    }

    clearSession();
  }

  async function onSubmit(e) {
    e.preventDefault();

    if (!canSubmitMovie) {
      setError("Username and lastname required");
      return;
    }

    const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/entry`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: authHeaders(),
      body: JSON.stringify(form)
    });

    const data = await res.json();

    if (!res.ok) {
      setError(data.error);
      return;
    }

    setForm(initialMovieForm);
    loadEntry();
  }

  if (!user) {
    return (
      <>
        <h2>{authMode === "login" ? "Login" : "Sign Up"}</h2>

        {error && <p>{error}</p>}

        <form onSubmit={onAuthSubmit}>
          {authMode === "signup" && (
            <>
              <label>
                Name:
                <input
                  name="name"
                  value={authForm.name}
                  onChange={handleAuthChange}
                />
              </label>
              <br />
            </>
          )}

          <label>
            Email:
            <input
              type="email"
              name="email"
              value={authForm.email}
              onChange={handleAuthChange}
            />
          </label>

          <br />

          <label>
            Password:
            <input
              type="password"
              name="password"
              value={authForm.password}
              onChange={handleAuthChange}
            />
          </label>

          <br />

          <button disabled={!canSubmitAuth}>
            {authMode === "login" ? "Login" : "Create Account"}
          </button>
        </form>

        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => {
            setError("");
            setAuthForm(initialAuthForm);
            setAuthMode(authMode === "login" ? "signup" : "login");
          }}
        >
          {authMode === "login" ? "Need an account? Sign up" : "Already have an account? Login"}
        </button>
      </>
    );
  }

  return (
    <>
      <h2>Movie Registration</h2>

      <p>
        Logged in as <b>{user.name}</b> ({user.email})
      </p>

      <button type="button" onClick={onLogout}>
        Logout
      </button>

      {error && <p>{error}</p>}

      <form onSubmit={onSubmit}>
        <label>
          Username:
          <input
            name="username"
            value={form.username}
            onChange={handleMovieChange}
          />
        </label>

        <br />

        <label>
          Lastname:
          <input
            name="lastname"
            value={form.lastname}
            onChange={handleMovieChange}
          />
        </label>

        <fieldset>
          <legend>Genre</legend>

          <label>
            <input
              type="radio"
              name="genres"
              value="thriller"
              checked={form.genres === "thriller"}
              onChange={handleMovieChange}
            />
            Thriller
          </label>

          <label>
            <input
              type="radio"
              name="genres"
              value="horror"
              checked={form.genres === "horror"}
              onChange={handleMovieChange}
            />
            Horror
          </label>
        </fieldset>

        <fieldset>
          <legend>Theatre</legend>

          <label>
            <input
              type="radio"
              name="theatres"
              value="PVR"
              checked={form.theatres === "PVR"}
              onChange={handleMovieChange}
            />
            PVR
          </label>
          <label>
            <input
              type="radio"
              name="theatres"
              value="INOX"
              checked={form.theatres === "INOX"}
              onChange={handleMovieChange}
            />
            INOX
          </label>
        </fieldset>
        <label>
          DOB:
          <input
            type="date"
            name="dob"
            value={form.dob}
            onChange={handleMovieChange}
          />
        </label>
        <br />
        <label>
          Movie Name:
          <input
            name="moviename"
            value={form.moviename}
            onChange={handleMovieChange}
          />
        </label>

        <br />

        <button disabled={!canSubmitMovie}>
          Submit
        </button>
      </form>

      <h3>History</h3>

      {entry.map(movie => (
        <div key={movie.id}>
          <p>
            <b>{movie.username} {movie.lastname}</b>
          </p>

          <p>Genre: {movie.genres}</p>

          <p>Theatre: {movie.theatres}</p>

          <p>Movie: {movie.moviename}</p>

          <p>DOB: {movie.dob}</p>

          <hr />
        </div>
      ))}
    </>
  );
}
